choose.when:
<set-variable name="promptContent" value="@{
                    try {
                        var body = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                        string promptContent = "";
                        var contentToken = body["messages"]?.Last?["content"];
                        if (body["input"] != null) {
                            promptContent = body["input"].ToString();
                        } else if (contentToken != null)
                        {
                            promptContent = contentToken.ToString();
                        }
                        return promptContent;
                    } catch {
                        return "";
                    }
                }" />
                
                    https://api.us1.zseclipse.net/v1/detection/execute-policy
                    POST
                    
                        Bearer {{aiguard-api-key}}
                    
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    @{
                        var prompt = (string)context.Variables["promptContent"];
                        var requestBody = new JObject(
                            new JProperty("content", prompt),
                            new JProperty("direction", "IN"),
                            new JProperty("policyId", 760)
                        );
                        return requestBody.ToString();
                    }
                
                
                    
                        
                            <when condition="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["aiguardPromptResponse"]).Body.As(preserveContent: true)["action"].ToString() == "BLOCK")">
                                
                                    
                                    
                                        application/json
                                    
                                    {"error": "REQUEST BLOCKED BY AI GUARD"}
